snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:
Austin Abrams
Zach Cherry
Kali Reis
and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#ResidentEvil #ResidentEvilMovie #ZachCregger #SonyPictures #OfficialTrailer #AustinAbrams #ZachCherry #KaliReis #PaulWalterHauser

snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Minggu 5 Hari 2
snippet.description:
Kemenangan bergaya ke atas RRQ Tora minggu lalu seakan memberi nafas baharu buat BTRM. Namun, adakah ini permulaan kebangkitan sebenar atau sekadar kilauan sementara?


Team Rey kini tampil sebagai pasukan yang konsisten, tetapi Team Flash yang sedang melalui fasa transformasi pasti ingin mendapatkan kemenangan. Siapa bakal mendominasi?


RRQ Tora pula hadir dengan misi bangkit selepas kekalahan lalu. Mampukah ‘Raja Rimba’ kembali mengaum, atau Sang Gergasi akan terus mendominasi? 


Sabtu | 2 Mei 2026 
⚔️ VMS vs BTRM - 2:30 PM
⚔️ FL vs TR - 5:00 PM
⚔️ SRG vs RRQ - 8:15 PM


📌 MPL MY Arena, Level 6, Quill City Mall Convention Centre
🎟️ Pautan di bio


#MYtimeMYera #MPLMYS17 #MLBB

snippet.title: EzHaRHaNzE - Bila Nanti Sunyi (Official Audio + Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Lagu ini tentang realiti seorang ibu bapa…
Saat anak kecil, rumah penuh dengan suara, gelak tawa, dan kekecohan. Kadang kita rasa penat, rasa rimas, dan marah tanpa sedar.

Tapi masa tak tunggu sesiapa.
Bila mereka dah besar… semua itu akan hilang perlahan-lahan.

Rumah jadi sunyi. Yang tinggal hanyalah kenangan.
“Bila Nanti Sunyi” adalah peringatan untuk kita semua — hargai setiap detik kecil bersama anak-anak, walaupun penat, walaupun bising…

kerana itulah memori yang akan kita rindukan nanti.

🎧 Artist: Ezharhanze
🎵 Title: Bila Nanti Sunyi

snippet.title: KAGURABACHI｜Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
KAGURABACHI set for TV Anime Adaptation by Cypic in April 2027!

Official Website: https://anime.kagurabachi.jp/en/
Official X: https://x.com/kb_anime_en
Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kb_anime_en/
Official TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kb_anime_en

[Introduction]
A single stroke opens a new era, cutting a path from Japan to the world—
Weekly Shonen Jump's Neo-Japanese Sword Action series begins here!

From day one, the Kagurabachi manga has captivated fans, weaving a blood-soaked tale of revenge through breathtaking sword-fight sequences.

And now, known for its uncompromising quality, animation studio Cypic brings the story to life with jaw-dropping visuals!

[Story]
Flames of resolve, kindled by hatred.

Chihiro Rokuhira is a boy who aspires to become a swordsmith, and took daily training under his father Kunishige, a renowned swordsmith. Their days, once filled with laughter, are brutally torn apart by an attack from the mysterious sorcerer organization, the Hishaku.

What is stolen from them are the six Enchanted Blades—swords of immense power capable of shaping the fate of the nation—and the gentle, warm life they once shared.

From that day on, everything changed. In a world engulfed in darkness, Chihiro takes up Enten, the seventh Enchanted Blade left behind by his father, and sets out on a blood-soaked path of revenge.

[Staff]
Original Work: “Kagurabachi” by Takeru Hokazono (Serialized in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump)
Director: Tetsuya Takeuchi
Character Design: Keigo Sasaki
Production: Cypic
Production Committee Leads: Shochiku & CyberAgent

[Cast]
Chihiro Rokuhira: Taihi Kimura

©Takeru Hokazono/SHUEISHA,Project Kagurabachi
#BachiAnime #カグラバチ #anime #animetrailer

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: Adat Bercinta - El Riss & Fana Ibrahim (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Stream "Adat Bercinta’ on all digital streaming platforms on 24/04/2026 : https://bfan.link/adat-bercinta

#AdatBercinta #ElRiss #FanaIbrahim #AwalMuzik

Adat Bercinta - El Riss & Fana Ibrahim (Official Music Video)

Audio Production
Title: Adat Bercinta
Artist: El Riss & Fana Ibrahim
Composer : Achik Asrain, Adek Soraya
Author : Achik Asrain, Adek Soraya

Penaja Utama :
Capredoca White Palace Bangi

Executive Producer :
Knight Cydeen 

Director :
Kael Abdullah 

Art Director :
Dany Yusoff

Assistant Production Manager :
Fieqhyqal & Ceknen

Pelakon Utama :
El Riss , Fana Ibrahim, Mal Kodok, Iris Amani, Andyoso

Prop & Pelakon Pembantu :

RXZ – Qasya & The Geng
Vespa - Aieman Hamdan

Video Production :
BangBol ( Saas Creative )

Editor :
BangBol ( Saas Creative ) & Awal Muzik Team

Wardrobe :
Awal Hijrah Enterprise

MUA :
Awal muzik Team


Memperkenalkan dua nama yang semakin mencuri perhatian dalam industri muzik tempatan El Riss dan Fana Ibrahim.

El Riss mula dikenali ramai menerusi lagu Lukisan yang telah meraih lebih 13 juta tontonan, selain konten “Cermin” di TikTok yang menjadi viral dan mendapat sambutan hangat. Manakala Fana Ibrahim pula merupakan artis yang semakin meningkat naik selepas tular dengan bakat bermain gitar, serta pernah mencuri perhatian menerusi penyertaannya dalam program The Chosen One.

Kini, mereka bergabung dalam sebuah duet menerusi lagu terbaru berjudul Adat Bercinta, hasil ciptaan Achik Asrain.

Lagu ini membawa kisah tentang realiti dalam percintaan bukan sekadar cinta yang indah, tetapi juga tentang cabaran, kejujuran dan kekuatan dalam sebuah hubungan.

Adat Bercinta bukan sekadar lagu cinta biasa. Ia sarat dengan emosi yang mendalam dan mesej yang dekat dengan kehidupan.

Kolaborasi ini menjanjikan sesuatu yang berbeza. Chemistry antara El Riss dan Fana Ibrahim jelas terasa dalam setiap bait lagu. Gabungan suara yang harmoni serta penceritaan yang kuat menjadikan lagu ini mudah melekat di telinga.

Setinggi-tinggi penghargaan dan terima kasih diucapkan kepada Capredoca White Palace Bangi atas sokongan sebagai rakan lokasi rasmi bagi penggambaran muzik video Adat Bercinta, yang telah menyediakan suasana lokasi yang indah dan eksklusif dalam menjayakan keseluruhan produksi ini.

Dengarkan Adat Bercinta sekarang dan hayati setiap makna yang disampaikan.

The Clash vs. Skeletons event is live, so it’s time to pick a team and push back against the Skeletons!

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress

- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan

- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

snippet.title: 胡沫 - 嘉賓『我放下所有回憶 來成全你的愛情 卻始終不願相信 這是命』【動態歌詞MV/Lyrics】
snippet.description:
🌟Nightfall Tunes🌟
歌曲：嘉賓
歌手：胡沫
歌詞：
分手後第幾個冬季
今天是星期幾
偶爾會想起你

你突如其來的簡訊
讓我措手不及
愣住站在原地

當所有人都替你開心
我卻才傻傻清醒
原來早已有人為你訂做了嫁衣

感謝你特別邀請
來見證你的愛情
我時刻提醒自己 別逃避
拿著喜帖一步一步走近
他精心佈置的場地
可惜這是屬於你的風景
而我只是嘉賓

我放下所有回憶
來成全你的愛情
卻始終不願相信 這是命
好久不見的你有點疏離
握手寒暄如此客氣
何必要在他的面前刻意
隱瞞我的世界 有過你

不知不覺鐘聲響起
你守候在原地
等待著他靠近

溫柔的他單膝跪地
鑽戒緩緩戴進
你的無名指裡

當所有人都替你開心
我卻才傻傻清醒
原來我們之間已沒有任何關係

感謝你特別邀請
來見證你的愛情
我時刻提醒自己 別逃避
今天你妝扮得格外美麗
這美也曾擁在懷裡
可惜這是你和他的婚禮
而我只是嘉賓

我放下所有回憶
來成全你的愛情
卻始終不願相信 這是命
說好的永遠變成了曾經
我試著衷心祝福你
請原諒我不體面沒出息
選擇失陪一下 先離席

又不是偶像劇
怎麼我演得那麼入戲
這不堪入目的劇情

感謝你特別邀請
觀賞你要的愛情
嘉賓也許是另一種宿命
離開你的自己事到如今
還有什麼資格關心
畢竟終成眷屬的人是你
而我只是嘉賓

我流盡所有回憶
來慶祝你的婚禮
卻始終沒有勇氣 祝福你
謝謝你送給我最後清醒
把自己還給我自己

至少我還能夠成為那個
見證你們愛情的嘉賓
遇見你的他真的好幸運
但願他會比我更愛你


🎶一個陪伴你的音樂空間，
從輕柔旋律到深沉情緒，
讓你在耳機里與夜晚共舞……

#NightfallTunes #music #音樂 #熱歌 #lyricsvideo #嘉賓 #胡沫
